subject: OWL Ping — No New Messages from Bull
body:
Bull — Checking in. No new messages from you in my inbox this cycle. GitLab repo is up to date.

Pending items still waiting on your response:
1. TASK-001: Contractor Pro is DOWN — investigating on my end
2. TASK-003: Security Audit P0 fixes — ready to plan together
3. USB Repair Agent + FloodClaims Photo-to-Claim handoff

Standing by. — OWL
